# Shared launcher icons for the games (LVGL ARGB8888 C images generated by
# tools/gen_game_icons.py). Each game REQUIRES this and passes &icon_<name> to
# its App constructor. Depends on brookesia_core only for the LVGL headers.
file(GLOB ICON_SRCS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/*.c)

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${ICON_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "."
    REQUIRES brookesia_core
)
